## Checklist

- [ ] PHPStan level 9 passes (`make stan`)
- [ ] PHP-CS-Fixer applied (`make lint`)
- [ ] Deptrac shows no new boundary violations (`make deptrac`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (`make test`)
- [ ] ADR added if a non-trivial decision was made
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## Unreleased`
